decisions.decision: Treat 'tooltip display' as trade count <text> labels above bars, not hover tooltips — no tooltip logic exists in the component
alternatives_rejected: Implement tooltip feature first then test it

decisions.decision: Empty state test verifies current behavior: SVG renders with gridlines/axes but zero <rect> bar elements — no dedicated empty message exists
alternatives_rejected: Test for a dedicated empty state message

decisions.decision: Test bar height proportionality via relative ratio comparison (volume ratio == height ratio) rather than exact pixel values
alternatives_rejected: Assert exact pixel heights coupled to layout constants

decisions.decision: Use plain render() from @testing-library/react — VolumeChart is purely presentational with no hooks, context, or state
Create a makeBucket() test factory inline at top of test file for constructing MarketAnalyticsVolumeBucket objects with sensible defaults
alternatives_rejected: Manually construct bucket objects in every test

steps.task: Create test file frontend/src/__tests__/VolumeChart.test.tsx with imports (vitest, @testing-library/react, VolumeChart) and a makeBucket() helper that returns a MarketAnalyticsVolumeBucket with overridable defaults (volume, tradeCount, bucketStart, bucketEnd)
Write 'renders SVG with data-testid' test: render VolumeChart with 1+ buckets, assert screen.getByTestId('volume-chart') exists and has role='img'
Write 'renders correct number of bars' test: render with N buckets, assert container.querySelectorAll('rect').length === N
Write 'bar heights are proportional to volume' test: render with buckets of volumes [100, 200, 50], parse rect height attributes, assert height ratios match volume ratios using toBeCloseTo
Write 'displays trade count labels above bars' test: render with known tradeCount values, assert matching <text> elements contain the expected trade count strings
Write 'empty state renders chart frame without bars' test: render with buckets=[], assert data-testid SVG present, zero <rect> elements, <line> elements still present for gridlines/axes
Write 'renders x-axis time labels' test: render with buckets, assert formatBucketRangeLabel output appears in <text> elements near the bottom of the chart
Write 'renders y-axis currency labels' test: render with known maxVolume, assert formatCurrency values appear in <text> elements for gridline labels (0, 50%, 100% of max)
Run vitest on the new test file, fix any failures, ensure all tests pass green
